acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-security-facility SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Sig-security mainly discusses the existing or future planned security technologies in the openEuler community version.. The SIG has 66 core members and maintains 104 repositories in the Security domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-security-facility SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-security-facility SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-security-facility SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-security-facility SIG maintains 104 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-security-facility.
